name: dizmo
description: DIZMO: Disaster Intelligence Zone Management Operator for Slack disaster response coordination.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dizmo/core && npm run build -w @dizmo/slack-app && npm run build -w @dizmo/relief-mcp && npm run build -w @dizmo/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @dizmo/core && npm run test -w @dizmo/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @dizmo/core && npm run typecheck -w @dizmo/slack-app && npm run typecheck -w @dizmo/relief-mcp && npm run typecheck -w @dizmo/web && npm run typecheck -w @dizmo/core
